title: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Spotify Technology (NYSE:SPOT) Price Target to $520.00
description: Spotify Technology (NYSE:SPOT – Get Free Report) had its target price upped by equities research analysts at Cantor Fitzgerald from $430.00 to $520.00 in a note issued to investors on Tuesday,Benzinga reports. title: Spotify AI Reveal Puts NYSE Composite Growth Story In Focus
description: Spotify’s AI announcements renew focus on licensing, creator tools, margins, and valuation as the streaming platform expands its growth strategy.

title: Assessing Spotify Technology (NYSE:SPOT) Valuation After Investor Day AI Announcements And Growth Targets
description:

title: William Blair Investment Management LLC Trims Position in Spotify Technology $SPOT
description: William Blair Investment Management LLC cut its stake in shares of Spotify Technology (NYSE:SPOT – Free Report) by 21.5% during the 4th quarter, HoldingsChannel reports. title: Why Spotify (SPOT) Is Up 19.0% After New AI Remix Deal And 2030 Targets
description:
Earlier this week, Spotify and Universal Music Group announced new recorded music and publishing licensing agreements that will let Spotify launch a paid Premium add-on enabling fans to create AI-powered covers and remixes from participating artists and songwriters, with extra income flowing to those creators on top of existing royalties.
At the same time, Spotify set out long-term goals through 2030 that tie these AI and fan-engagement tools to margin improvement, subscriber expansion...
